name: Walnut-Stuffed Paratha
tagline: Whole-wheat paratha stuffed with crushed walnuts and herbs — omega-3 ALA

hero.alt: Stuffed paratha cut into wedges showing chopped walnuts and herbs inside
hero.caption: walnut paratha — omega-3 stuffed flatbread

steps.title: Knead the dough and mix the filling
steps.detail: Knead whole-wheat flour, salt, 1 tsp ghee, and water into a soft dough. Rest 15 min. Mix crushed walnuts, onion, coriander, chili, cumin, chaat masala, and salt for the filling.
steps.tip: Crush walnuts with the side of a knife — uniform, not powdered.

steps.title: Stuff and roll
steps.detail: Roll a small disc, place 2 tbsp filling in the centre, gather the edges to seal, flatten, and roll out gently to 6-inch round. Don't press hard — filling will burst.
steps.tip: Dust generously with dry flour while rolling — sticky dough tears.

steps.title: Cook on tawa
steps.detail: Heat a tawa, cook each paratha 1 min per side, then brush both sides with ghee and crisp another 30 seconds per side. Stack covered to keep soft.
steps.tip: Eat hot with thick yogurt and a slice of pickle.

healthFacts: Walnuts: 2.5g ALA omega-3 per 30g — the richest plant source.
ALA helps raise HDL and lower triglycerides; partly converts to EPA/DHA.
Magnesium, copper, and vitamin E in walnuts support blood vessels and brain.
Whole-wheat shell adds slow carbs and fiber — keeps glucose stable.
